---
title: "Data-Driven Conservation and Environmental Decision Making"
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: "projects/*/*.qmd"
    include:
      category: "data"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, description]
format: html
---

I apply a variety of statistical methods, from spatially explicit point process models to generalized linear mixed effects models to disentangle ecological patterns. I am also interested in developing tools that make landscape and environmental data and accessible to a wider audience.

## Related Projects

::::{#projects}
::::
